architecture.summary: All changes are SKILL.md/template edits — no code architecture. ADR decisions: keep compensating controls as fallbacks, QUERY_READY opt-in via templates, TeammateIdle hook documented not auto-configured, broadcast scoped to shutdown+global only

integrations.summary: Integrates with Claude Code Agent Teams API v2.1.32+: TeamCreate, SendMessage, broadcast, TeammateIdle hook, teammateMode setting. No external service integrations. tmux/iTerm2 for split-pane display.

ui-ux.summary: New UX: split-pane visibility via teammateMode auto/tmux, Shift+Down cycling in in-process mode, direct click-into-pane interaction in tmux mode. Documented as Section 0.7 and 6b with hazard warnings.

performance.summary: Broadcast costs scale linearly with team size — scoped to shutdown+global only. Idle agents consume session resources but no tokens while waiting. Task-count guard (<12) prevents querying context-saturated agents. TeammateIdle hook circuit breaker prevents infinite re-engagement loops.

security.summary: bypassPermissions retained — no trust-prompt deadlock risk. Formal plan approval explicitly rejected (red line). Direct user-to-teammate interaction documented as coordination hazard with echo-to-lead mitigation. No secrets or auth changes.

edge-cases.summary: TeammateIdle hook infinite loop mitigated by max-3 circuit breaker. Context-saturated agents (15-task cap) excluded from queries via <12 guard. Phase 3 bash cleanup kept as fallback for non-tmux environments. broadcast thundering-herd scoped by usage discipline. Task status lag unaffected (self-claiming skipped).
